author: lyxtsinghua
description: Quickly switch between light, dark, follow-system, and eye-care themes, with gentler PDF reading. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: lyx
manifest.description: Quickly switch between light, dark, follow-system, and eye-care themes, with gentler PDF reading.
manifest.name: Theme Quick Switch

name: Theme Quick Switch

releases.author: lyxTsinghua
releases.description:
Initial public release of Theme Quick Switch.

Highlights:
- One-click switching between light, dark, and follow-system themes
- Eye-care mode for long reading sessions
- Softer PDF reading, including a light green PDF page treatment in eye-care mode
- Status bar controls and ribbon access for faster switching

Assets included for Obsidian installation:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css
